questionHtml: Ammonium nitrate is neutralized with sodium hydroxide. Write the equation for the reaction.
markschemeHtml:
NH4+ (aq) + OH– (aq) → NH3 (aq) + H2O (l)

OR

NH4NO3 (aq) + NaOH (aq) → NH3 (aq) + H2O (l) + NaNO3 (aq) ✔

 

Accept NH4OH instead of NH3 + H2O.

meta.title: Ammonium nitrate is neutralized with sodium hydroxide. Write the equation for the reaction.
breadcrumbLabels: 1.1 Introduction to the particulate nature of matter and chemical change
